titleStmt.title: SII 34.363: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 363. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the cross wall of the east prākāra in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Kōnērinmaikoṇḍān [Rāarājan Sundarapāṇḍya], 12th year, Mithuna, sudi, Friday, 1, Pushya = A.D. 1263.

The king ordered the trustees of the Tirukkuṉṟākkuḍi temple and the nāṭṭār of Tenmalai that the temple need not pay a sum of 101 pon towards the usual government dues (iṟai) and instead use it for offerings at the service Rājarājaṉ Sundara-Pāṇḍyaṉ-sandi, instituted in his name.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanaccakravartti kOṉEriṉmai koṇṭāṉ ceya
ciṅkakulakāla vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭapanaṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi
Uṭaiya nāyanār kōyil tānattāṟkum tenmalai nāṭṭāṟkum Uṭai
yār tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyanār kōyil pūcai mikutiyāyc cilavaṟukkum po
n nūṟṟu Oṉṟum yinnāyaṉāṟkku nampērāl kaṭṭina Iracarācan cuntarapāṇṭi
yan cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa pala viñcaṉattukkum Uṭalāka paṉṉiraṇ
ṭāvatu mituna nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakkattu veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum pradhamaiyum peṟṟa
pūcattu nāḷ yiṟaiyiṟ kaḻittu variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻippatākac connōm yi
ppaṭikku Ivvōlaiyē piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu nāṭṭukkaṇakkilum kaḻittu cantirā
titavaṟ cella kallilum cempilum veṭṭi pūcaittāḻvaṟa naṭattip pōtuka
Ivai ciṟukampūruṭaiyar Eḻuttu Ivai ciṟukampūruṭaiyāṉ cēra nārāyaṇa(ya
ṇa) pperumāṉāna pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 34.363 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
